Name: Projects Module MVP
Description: Implement backend CRUD logic, database schema refinements, and frontend list/detail views for the Projects module which is currently a placeholder; verify connections to clients and tasks.

Name: Implement Project UI
Description: Build responsive project list table, detail view, creation form, and settings page relying on App Router patterns.

Name: Project Budget vs Costs Analytics
Description: Develop UI and Server Actions to track project budget against aggregated costs and calculate margins.

Name: Document Generator Milestone
Description: Complete the document module by adding true WYSIWYG template editing and PDF export functionality.

Name: PDF Export Service
Description: Integrate a PDF generation library (e.g. react-pdf or Puppeteer) for exporting Offers, Contracts, and Invoices.

Name: Template Variable Engine
Description: Build logic to replace template variables (e.g. {{clientName}}, {{invoiceAmount}}) with real database values upon generation.

Name: Revenue Module Finalization
Description: Remove mock logic for MRR and add invoice generation capabilities.

Name: MRR Calculation Logic
Description: Refactor getRevenueKPIs action to calculate true MRR based on recurring retainers rather than just current month billed.

Name: Implement Invoice Creation Flow
Description: Build the 'New Invoice' form, Zod validations, and Prisma server action hooked up to the Revenue dashboard placeholder button.

Name: Global Omnibar Search
Description: Implement CMD+K global search modal for leads, clients, projects, and documents; ensure tenant isolation on search queries.

Name: Dashboard UI Responsiveness Sweep
Description: Fix data tables and kanban boards to scroll horizontally on mobile devices without breaking the layout.

Name: Convert Lead to Client Workflow
Description: Create action and modal to migrate a successful Lead to the Client database, linking all past activities.

Name: Activity Timeline Improvements
Description: Ensure manual note-adding functionality is wired up on both Client and Lead detail views with optimistic updates.

Name: Task Kanban Drag & Drop API
Description: Connect frontend drag events in KanbanBoard.tsx to Prisma update actions for task status and positioning.

Name: Task Workload Analytics
Description: Complete the workload view for Project Managers to see developer capacity and assigned tasks across active projects.

Name: Audit Log Viewer
Description: Create an admin-only page to view system-wide audit logs (who did what) required by SaaS access rules.

Name: Setup CI/CD Pipeline
Description: Create GitHub Actions workflow for linting, Next.js build verification, and automated testing deployment.
